description_long: This jewelry object features a tall, irregularly shaped, translucent form that appears to be crafted from a crystalline or mineral-like material. The main body is roughly vertical, tapering to a point at the top, and is mounted on a small, rounded base. The surface is uneven and textured, with a frosted appearance and a few visible inclusions, including a distinct blue circular accent on one side. The object is predominantly white with subtle grayish tones, and the blue accent provides a striking contrast. The overall design is abstract and organic, evoking the look of a natural crystal or mineral specimen.
description: An abstract, crystalline pendant with a frosted white surface and a prominent blue accent, mounted on a small base. The design is organic and textured, resembling a natural mineral.
description_view_0: The object is seen from above, highlighting the pointed tip and the irregular, crystalline structure with a white, frosted surface.
description_view_1: This side view reveals the textured, mineral-like body and the rounded base, with the blue accent partially visible.
description_view_2: A rear angle shows the tapering, pointed form and the translucent quality of the material, with less emphasis on the blue accent.
description_view_3: The blue circular accent is clearly visible on the side of the crystalline body, contrasting with the frosted white surface.
